description: The frozen format-hardened base eleven and four structural specialists solve 24 fresh cases before answer-independent disagreement routing.

strategies.name: Frozen Stable Eleven
strategies.description: Eleven general generators used both for the base vote and the maximum-disagreement router.

stages.instruction: Work carefully on this smaller case set. For each sequence, compare global structures, verify a late suffix when possible, and return the exact continuation supported by the strongest compact rule.

strategies.name: Frozen Four Structural Specialists
strategies.description: Four additional generators reinforce bounded state, phase-dependent state, variable segments, and alternate coordinate systems.

stages.instruction: Work carefully on this smaller case set. Use the assigned structural lens as a serious alternative, but reject it if it does not replay the entire prefix exactly.
